description: Kill-list for Gate B2. kind=revert-fix entries get a minimal re-introduction patch derived from the fix diff (human-reviewed, product code only, never the fix's own tests); kind=verify-live entries are historically observed bugs with no confirmed fix commit — the new test must fail on the first GPU session if the bug is still present, then the entry converts to revert-fix once fixed.

acceptance.exemption_rule: An entry may be exempted only with a recorded reason in the kill-rate artifact (e.g. minimal patch cannot reproduce at tiny shapes); exemptions shrink the denominator.

entries.title: chat REPL EOS / stop_sequences / stream / pos_offset all broken after engine swap
entries.expected_failing_surface: tiny full-stack: eos_terminates, stop_sequidentifier, stream chunk contract, multi-turn

entries.title: stop text spanning composite tokens not detected
entries.expected_failing_surface: tiny full-stack: stop sequence inside composite token scenario

entries.title: guided decoding leaves control tokens unmasked / premature guided EOS
entries.expected_failing_surface: tiny full-stack: guided/tool constraint decoding scenario

entries.title: tool constraints not enforcing full logits
entries.expected_failing_surface: tiny full-stack: guided/tool constraint decoding scenario

entries.title: forced tool argument strings unbounded
entries.expected_failing_surface: in-process OpenAI wire: tool-call argument bound scenario

entries.title: /v1/models empty; empty messages returns 200; custom stop leaks stop char; greedy non-deterministic
entries.source: PR #8 server smoke findings (memory 2026-05-19); fix commits to be located in stage 0 patch derivation
entries.expected_failing_surface: in-process OpenAI wire scenarios: /v1/models non-empty, empty-messages 400, stop leak, greedy determinism

entries.title: missing per-item fallback when supports_varlen_qkv()=false
entries.expected_failing_surface: capability-fallback law: CPU all-optional-caps-off full-stack run

entries.title: paged_batch_* scratch not re-initialized after ensure_scratch realloc
entries.expected_failing_surface: tiny full-stack: KV capacity boundary scenario (scratch growth across batches)
entries.notes: May not reproduce at tiny shapes; exemption candidate per acceptance.exemption_rule.

entries.title: multi-turn turn-3 paged_varlen_attention CUDA_ERROR_INVALID_VALUE panic
entries.expected_failing_surface: L1-cuda multi-turn chat (>=5 turns); fix first if still reproducible

entries.title: vllm-moe-marlin packing mismatch / CUDA 13 template garbage output
entries.expected_failing_surface: CUDA reference_match fingerprint + gptq_marlin_linear op parity

entries.title: kv_len > shared-memory budget (24576 on sm_89) kernel launch INVALID_VALUE
entries.expected_failing_surface: L0 launch-plan pure-function shape test; L1-cuda real-launch smoke
